_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: notes_fts
data.create_virtual_stmt: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE "notes_fts" USING fts5(title, body, content='notes', content_rowid='rowid')

data.name: notes_fts_insert
notes_fts_delete
notes_fts_update

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "workspaces" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "color" INTEGER NOT NULL, "icon" TEXT NOT NULL, "enabled_modules" TEXT NOT NULL, "sort_order" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notes" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "body" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_type" TEXT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "notes_fts" USING fts5(title, body, content='notes', content_rowid='rowid');
CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_insert AFTER INSERT ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts ("rowid", title, body) VALUES (new."rowid", new.title, new.body);END
CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_delete AFTER DELETE ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts (notes_fts, "rowid", title, body) VALUES ('delete', old."rowid", old.title, old.body);END

CREATE TRIGGER notes_fts_update AFTER UPDATE ON notes BEGIN INSERT INTO notes_fts (notes_fts, "rowid", title, body) VALUES ('delete', old."rowid", old.title, old.body);INSERT INTO notes_fts ("rowid", title, body) VALUES (new."rowid", new.title, new.body);END

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NULL, "phone" TEXT NULL, "organization" TEXT NULL, "notes_text" TEXT NULL, "default_hourly_rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "workspace_contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "role_label" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "events" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "location" TEXT NULL, "starts_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ends_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "all_day" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("all_day" IN (0, 1)), "rrule" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "event_contacts" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "event_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "contact_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tasks" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', "due_at" INTEGER NULL, "reminder_at" INTEGER NULL, "event_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "priority" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal', PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "billable_items" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "event_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES events (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NULL, "rate_cents" INTEGER NULL, "duration_minutes" INTEGER NULL, "amount_cents" INTEGER NULL, "currency" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EUR', "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unbilled', PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "timer_sessions" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "workspace_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES workspaces (id), "contact_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES contacts (id), "description" TEXT NULL, "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "stopped_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "reminders" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "owner_id" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, "is_dirty" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK ("is_dirty" IN (0, 1)), "parent_type" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "fire_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "delivered" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("delivered" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
